---
title: "Labor Market Health Check"
---

---
title: "Labor Market Health Check"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: false
    code-tools: false
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| results: asis

library(jsonlite)

labor_data <- read.csv("labor_final_clean.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

labor_data$label <- paste(labor_data$year, labor_data$month_en, labor_data$gender)

data_json <- jsonlite::toJSON(labor_data, dataframe = "rows", auto_unbox = TRUE)

cat("<script>")
cat("const labourData = ")
cat(data_json)
cat(";")
cat("</script>")
```

```{=html}
<style>
.game-container {
  max-width: 1050px;
  margin: 30px auto;
  padding: 30px;
  border-radius: 28px;
  background: #f7f8fa;
  box-shadow: 0 10px 28px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
  font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
}

.game-title {
  font-size: 38px;
  font-weight: 800;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.game-subtitle {
  font-size: 17px;
  color: #555;
  margin-bottom: 24px;
  line-height: 1.5;
}

.control-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 18px;
  margin-bottom: 22px;
}

.control-box {
  background: white;
  padding: 20px;
  border-radius: 18px;
  border: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
}

select {
  width: 100%;
  padding: 13px;
  border-radius: 12px;
  border: 1px solid #bbb;
  font-size: 16px;
  margin-top: 10px;
}

.result-card {
  padding: 28px;
  border-radius: 24px;
  border: 3px solid #ddd;
  background: white;
  transition: 0.3s ease;
}

.result-strong {
  border-color: #2e7d32;
  background: #e8f5e9;
}

.result-moderate {
  border-color: #f9a825;
  background: #fff8e1;
}

.result-weak {
  border-color: #c62828;
  background: #ffebee;
}

.badge {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 6px 12px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: #263238;
  color: white;
  font-size: 13px;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.condition {
  font-size: 50px;
  font-weight: 900;
  margin: 12px 0;
  letter-spacing: 3px;
}

.score {
  font-size: 21px;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
}

.metrics {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  gap: 15px;
  margin-top: 18px;
}

.metric-box {
  background: white;
  border-radius: 16px;
  padding: 18px;
  border: 1px solid #ddd;
  text-align: center;
}

.metric-value {
  font-size: 32px;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.metric-label {
  font-size: 14px;
  color: #666;
}

.comment-box {
  background: white;
  border-radius: 16px;
  padding: 18px;
  margin-top: 22px;
  border: 1px solid #ddd;
  font-size: 16px;
  line-height: 1.55;
}

.bar-area {
  margin-top: 26px;
}

.bar-row {
  margin-bottom: 16px;
}

.bar-label {
  font-weight: 700;
  margin-bottom: 6px;
}

.bar-background {
  width: 100%;
  background: #e0e0e0;
  border-radius: 999px;
  height: 22px;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.bar-fill {
  height: 22px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: #607d8b;
  width: 0%;
  transition: width 0.5s ease;
}

.insight-box {
  margin-top: 24px;
  padding: 22px;
  background: white;
  border-radius: 18px;
  border: 1px solid #ddd;
  line-height: 1.55;
}

.chart-box {
  margin-top: 24px;
  padding: 22px;
  background: white;
  border-radius: 18px;
  border: 1px solid #ddd;
}

canvas {
  width: 100%;
  height: 320px;
}

@media (max-width: 750px) {
  .control-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .metrics {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
}
</style>

<div class="game-container">
  <div class="game-title">Labor Market Game</div>
  <div class="game-subtitle">
    Choose a gender group and a month. The game scores the labor market using unemployment rate, employment rate, and labor force participation rate.
  </div>

  <div class="control-grid">
    <div class="control-box">
      <label for="genderSelect"><b>Select Group</b></label>
      <select id="genderSelect" onchange="fillPeriodDropdown(); updateGame();"></select>
    </div>

    <div class="control-box">
      <label for="periodSelect"><b>Select Month</b></label>
      <select id="periodSelect" onchange="updateGame();"></select>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div id="resultCard" class="result-card">
    <div class="badge">Labour Market Result</div>
    <h2 id="selectedPeriod"></h2>
    <div id="conditionText" class="condition"></div>
    <div id="scoreText" class="score"></div>

    <div class="metrics">
      <div class="metric-box">
        <div id="unemploymentValue" class="metric-value"></div>
        <div class="metric-label">Unemployment Rate</div>
      </div>

      <div class="metric-box">
        <div id="employmentValue" class="metric-value"></div>
        <div class="metric-label">Employment Rate</div>
      </div>

      <div class="metric-box">
        <div id="participationValue" class="metric-value"></div>
        <div class="metric-label">Participation Rate</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div id="commentText" class="comment-box"></div>

    <div class="bar-area">
      <div class="bar-row">
        <div class="bar-label">Employment Strength</div>
        <div class="bar-background">
          <div id="employmentBar" class="bar-fill"></div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="bar-row">
        <div class="bar-label">Participation Strength</div>
        <div class="bar-background">
          <div id="participationBar" class="bar-fill"></div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="bar-row">
        <div class="bar-label">Unemployment Risk</div>
        <div class="bar-background">
          <div id="unemploymentBar" class="bar-fill"></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="chart-box">
    <h3>Unemployment Trend for Selected Group</h3>
    <canvas id="trendChart" width="1000" height="320"></canvas>
  </div>

  <div class="insight-box">
    <h3>How does the game work?</h3>
    <p>
      The game gives points based on three indicators. Lower unemployment is better, while higher employment and higher labor force participation are better.
    </p>
    <p>
      A total score of 8 or 9 means <b>Strong</b>, 5 to 7 means <b>Moderate</b>, and 3 or 4 means <b>Weak</b>.
    </p>
    <p>
      This tool uses all monthly observations from the cleaned CSV data set.
    </p>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
function uniqueValues(arr) {
  return [...new Set(arr)];
}

function fillGenderDropdown() {
  const genderSelect = document.getElementById("genderSelect");
  genderSelect.innerHTML = "";

  const genders = uniqueValues(labourData.map(d => d.gender));

  genders.forEach(gender => {
    const option = document.createElement("option");
    option.value = gender;
    option.text = gender;
    genderSelect.appendChild(option);
  });

  if (genders.includes("Total")) {
    genderSelect.value = "Total";
  }
}

function fillPeriodDropdown() {
  const gender = document.getElementById("genderSelect").value;
  const periodSelect = document.getElementById("periodSelect");

  periodSelect.innerHTML = "";

  const filtered = labourData.filter(d => d.gender === gender);

  filtered.forEach((d, index) => {
    const option = document.createElement("option");
    option.value = index;
    option.text = d.year + " " + d.month_en;
    periodSelect.appendChild(option);
  });

  periodSelect.value = filtered.length - 1;
}

function getSelectedData() {
  const gender = document.getElementById("genderSelect").value;
  const periodIndex = Number(document.getElementById("periodSelect").value);

  const filtered = labourData.filter(d => d.gender === gender);

  return {
    selected: filtered[periodIndex],
    filtered: filtered,
    selectedIndex: periodIndex
  };
}

function getScore(selected) {
  const unemploymentScore = selected.unemp_rate <= 9 ? 3 : selected.unemp_rate <= 12 ? 2 : 1;
  const employmentScore = selected.emp_rate >= 48 ? 3 : selected.emp_rate >= 43 ? 2 : 1;
  const participationScore = selected.lfp_rate >= 53 ? 3 : selected.lfp_rate >= 48 ? 2 : 1;

  return unemploymentScore + employmentScore + participationScore;
}

function updateGame() {
  const result = getSelectedData();
  const selected = result.selected;
  const filtered = result.filtered;
  const selectedIndex = result.selectedIndex;

  const totalScore = getScore(selected);

  let condition = "";
  let cardClass = "result-card ";
  let comment = "";

  if (totalScore >= 8) {
    condition = "STRONG";
    cardClass += "result-strong";
    comment = "This month shows a strong labor market condition. Employment and participation are relatively high, while unemployment is comparatively low.";
  } else if (totalScore >= 5) {
    condition = "MODERATE";
    cardClass += "result-moderate";
    comment = "This month shows a moderate labor market condition. Some indicators are positive, but the overall picture is not the strongest.";
  } else {
    condition = "WEAK";
    cardClass += "result-weak";
    comment = "This month shows a weak labor market condition. Unemployment is relatively high, or employment and participation are weaker compared with other months.";
  }

  document.getElementById("resultCard").className = cardClass;
  document.getElementById("selectedPeriod").innerText = selected.year + " " + selected.month_en + " - " + selected.gender;
  document.getElementById("conditionText").innerText = condition;
  document.getElementById("scoreText").innerText = "Score: " + totalScore + " / 9";

  document.getElementById("unemploymentValue").innerText = selected.unemp_rate + "%";
  document.getElementById("employmentValue").innerText = selected.emp_rate + "%";
  document.getElementById("participationValue").innerText = selected.lfp_rate + "%";

  document.getElementById("commentText").innerText = comment;

  document.getElementById("employmentBar").style.width = Math.min(selected.emp_rate * 1.8, 100) + "%";
  document.getElementById("participationBar").style.width = Math.min(selected.lfp_rate * 1.7, 100) + "%";
  document.getElementById("unemploymentBar").style.width = Math.min(selected.unemp_rate * 6, 100) + "%";

  drawChart(filtered, selectedIndex);
}

function drawChart(filtered, selectedIndex) {
  const canvas = document.getElementById("trendChart");
  const ctx = canvas.getContext("2d");

  ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

  const padding = 50;
  const width = canvas.width - padding * 2;
  const height = canvas.height - padding * 2;

  const values = filtered.map(d => Number(d.unemp_rate));
  const minVal = Math.min(...values) - 1;
  const maxVal = Math.max(...values) + 1;

  function xPos(i) {
    return padding + (i / (filtered.length - 1)) * width;
  }

  function yPos(v) {
    return padding + height - ((v - minVal) / (maxVal - minVal)) * height;
  }

  ctx.strokeStyle = "#dddddd";
  ctx.lineWidth = 1;

  for (let i = 0; i <= 5; i++) {
    const y = padding + (i / 5) * height;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(padding, y);
    ctx.lineTo(padding + width, y);
    ctx.stroke();
  }

  ctx.strokeStyle = "#455a64";
  ctx.lineWidth = 2;
  ctx.beginPath();

  filtered.forEach((d, i) => {
    const x = xPos(i);
    const y = yPos(Number(d.unemp_rate));

    if (i === 0) {
      ctx.moveTo(x, y);
    } else {
      ctx.lineTo(x, y);
    }
  });

  ctx.stroke();

  filtered.forEach((d, i) => {
    const x = xPos(i);
    const y = yPos(Number(d.unemp_rate));

    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(x, y, i === selectedIndex ? 6 : 2.3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fillStyle = i === selectedIndex ? "#c62828" : "#607d8b";
    ctx.fill();
  });

  const selected = filtered[selectedIndex];

  ctx.fillStyle = "#222";
  ctx.font = "16px Arial";
  ctx.fillText(
    selected.year + " " + selected.month_en + " | Unemployment: " + selected.unemp_rate + "%",
    padding,
    25
  );
}

fillGenderDropdown();
fillPeriodDropdown();
updateGame();
</script>

<!-- AI Usage: All of the "Labor Market Health Check" page is created by AI.-->
<!-- AI Prompt: "How can I create a simple interactive labor market game for our website where users select a group and month, see the main values, get a score, and view a small trend chart?"-->
```
